testcase.name: test_body_paragraph_excludes_textbox_text
testcase.failure: tests/test_docx_body_textbox_dedup.py:127: in test_body_paragraph_excludes_textbox_text assert body_seg.text == "BODY_PLAIN" E AssertionError: assert 'BODY_PLAINTB_TEXT' == 'BODY_PLAIN' E E - BODY_PLAIN E + BODY_PLAINTB_TEXT
